description_long: This is a classic baseball cap featuring a six-panel construction with visible stitched seams running from the top button to the base of the crown. The crown is made of a soft, matte blue fabric, while the brim is wide, flat, and colored in a contrasting pink. The rear of the cap has an open section, typical for adjustable baseball caps, allowing for ventilation and size adjustment. The stitching is done in a dark thread, providing a subtle accent to the overall design. The cap appears unadorned, with no visible logos, patches, or decorative elements.
description: A blue six-panel baseball cap with a wide pink flat brim and visible stitched seams, featuring an open back for adjustment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue crown with stitched seams and the wide, flat pink brim prominently.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curvature of the crown and the extended pink brim.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open adjustable section at the back of the blue crown.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the crown's contour and the pink brim's extension.
